name: Docsumo Intelligent Document Processing API
what_it_does: AI-powered Intelligent Document Processing (IDP) platform with REST API — extracting structured data from complex, variable-format documents using machine learning, with human-in-the-loop review workflow, confidence scoring, and continuous model improvement from corrections.
use_cases: Automating invoice and AP document processing with AI extraction via REST API
Processing bank statements and financial documents for loan underwriting automation
Extracting data from utility bills and insurance documents for customer onboarding
Building human-in-the-loop review queues for low-confidence extractions via webhook
Integrating Docsumo with ERP systems for automated accounts payable workflows
not_for: Simple, fixed-format document parsing (use Docparser for rule-based extraction)
Real-time document processing with sub-second latency requirements
Unstructured free-text document analysis (use NLP/LLM for semantic analysis)
best_when: A fintech, insurance, or enterprise operations team needs to process high-volume, variable-format documents (invoices, bank statements, tax forms) with AI extraction and confidence-based human review routing.
avoid_when: Documents have consistent, simple layouts (rule-based parsing is cheaper), or you need real-time extraction with no human review workflow.

auth.notes: API key from Docsumo account settings. Passed as X-App-Id and X-App-Key headers. Separate app ID and app key required. No OAuth2 or scopes. Webhook for document processing completion and review status events.

pricing.free_tier_limits: 14-day free trial; no permanent free tier
pricing.notes: Indian company (New Delhi/San Francisco). Founded 2019. YC W20. Raised $12M. ML models for 50+ document types pre-trained. Confidence scoring built-in. Human review queue for low-confidence extractions. Strong fintech and insurance vertical adoption. Page-based or document-based pricing options.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for document upload, status polling, extraction results, and review management. Dual header auth (X-App-Id + X-App-Key). Good developer documentation. Processing is async with webhook notification. Confidence scores help route low-confidence docs to human review. Model types must be configured per document category.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Document uploads create new records — not idempotent by content hash. Result reads fully idempotent by document ID. Review status reads idempotent. Model configuration reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Dual header auth (X-App-Id + X-App-Key) — both required, not just one
Document model type must match document category — wrong model gives poor results
Confidence threshold configuration affects human review queue volume
Processing latency varies by document complexity — plan for 5-30 second async
Human review workflow means extractions may not be final immediately after processing

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. HIPAA compliant for healthcare documents. US and EU data residency. Dual header auth. Financial and personal documents require highest security — implement secure key rotation. YC-backed with enterprise security standards.
